changelog: Phase 7.5: split-bill payments scaffolding. New table group_payment_intents tracks per-payer chunks of a group_orders row; group_orders.split_mode picks host (legacy) / per_seat / equal. New POST /api/group-create-payment-intent.php endpoint takes (group_code, payer_label, optional seat_label, optional share_count) and returns a YooKassa confirmation_url for that payer's share. payment-webhook.php now recognises metadata.kind='group_intent' and reconciles aggregate paid total — when SUM(paid intents) >= group total it fires cleanmenu_on_order_paid for every underlying order so loyalty + fiscal receipts run per guest. 9 new DB methods on Database (getGroupOrderTotal/getGroupSeatTotal/listGroupPaymentIntents/createGroupPaymentIntent/attachYkPaymentIdToGroupIntent/markGroupPaymentIntentPaid/getGroupPaidTotal/setGroupOrderSplitMode/markGroupOrderPaid). UI picker on /group.php pending in a follow-up.
